Lace Suppliers

Quality suppliers for all your lace making needs. From bobbins and thread to accessories and specialty items — everything you need for your lace projects.

Recommended

The Lace Guild

The Lace Guild is your destination for the stunning art of lace and lace making! Nestled at The Hollies near Stourbridge, the museum is filled with rich history and endless inspiration. Become a member to engage with local groups, explore the charm of vintage lace, and enjoy your quarterly journal.

Visit Website

Hedge End Bobbin Lacemakers

Join our vibrant community and explore the beautiful art of bobbin lace-making. All skill levels welcome.
